verdict_reasoning: CRISP1 is a secreted glycoprotein that associates with sperm plasma membrane in the epididymis. A strongly bound population persists as wash-resistant on the sperm surface—behaving as an integral membrane protein—and participates in zona pellucida and gamete fusion. This stably anchored sperm-surface form represents outer-leaflet accessibility, but is restricted to male germ cells (germline/sperm compartment).
